title: Boson Sampling and Photonic Quantum Advantage
description: Comprehensive exploration of boson sampling as a pathway to quantum computational advantage, covering mathematical foundations, experimental implementations, and hardness arguments.
learningObjectives: Understand the mathematical connection between boson sampling and matrix permanents
Implement boson sampling simulation using the hafnian for Gaussian states
Analyze experimental challenges and noise resilience of photonic systems
Compare boson sampling with other quantum supremacy proposals
Evaluate spoofing strategies and validation techniques
